title: Better: A Surgeon's Notes on Performance
author: Atul Gawande
description: Simplified Chinese edition of Better: A Surgeon's Notes on Performance by Atul Gawande. Gawande is named one of the most influential doctors in 2010. His Checklist Manifesto has changed many hospital hygiene practices and cut down the hospital borne infections. In Simplified Chinese. Distributed by Tsai Fong Books, Inc.
